purpose: To build a functional web platform enabling customers to browse, purchase, and track products, and allowing administrators to manage inventory and orders.
scope_in: Basic Admin product and order management
roles: End-user who browses, adds items to cart, and places orders.
Internal user responsible for managing products, inventory, and viewing/updating orders.
workflows: {"workflow_name": "Customer Purchase Flow", "steps": ["Browse Catalog -> View Product Details -> Add to Cart -> Review Cart -> Checkout -> Place Order -> Receive Confirmation"]}
{"workflow_name": "Admin Inventory Update Flow", "steps": ["Login -> Navigate to Product Management -> Edit Product Details -> Update Stock/Price -> Save"]}
business_rules: {"rule_id": "BR-001", "rule": "A customer must be logged in or provide shipping details to proceed to checkout."}
{"rule_id": "BR-002", "rule": "Product stock cannot be negative; the system must prevent overselling."}
{"rule_id": "BR-003", "rule": "The total order price must equal the sum of (Quantity * Unit Price) plus applicable shipping costs."}
assumptions: Payment gateway is mocked (no live transaction processing required)
Inventory data can be sample data
Admin authentication can be basic for MVP

functional_requirements.title: Product Catalog Browsing
functional_requirements.description: The system must allow customers to view a list of available products with basic filtering and search functionality.

acceptance_criteria.description: The system must display product name, price, and image thumbnail on the catalog page.
The system must allow filtering by category.

functional_requirements.title: Product Detail Viewing
functional_requirements.description: The system must display comprehensive details for a selected product.

acceptance_criteria.description: The product detail page must display description, price, available stock, and multiple images.
The user must be able to select a quantity and add the item to the cart.

functional_requirements.title: Shopping Cart Management
functional_requirements.description: The system must allow users to add, modify quantities, and remove items from a persistent shopping cart.

acceptance_criteria.description: The cart must display the subtotal, tax, and total price.
The user must be able to update the quantity of an item in the cart.

functional_requirements.title: Checkout Process
functional_requirements.description: The system must guide the user through a multi-step checkout process (Shipping -> Billing -> Payment).

acceptance_criteria.description: The system must validate required fields for shipping and billing addresses.
The system must calculate and display shipping costs based on the provided address.

functional_requirements.title: Order Placement
functional_requirements.description: The system must finalize the transaction, process payment (mocked), and create a permanent order record.

acceptance_criteria.description: Upon successful placement, the system must generate a unique Order ID and confirmation page.
The system must decrement the stock count for all purchased items.

functional_requirements.title: Order History Viewing
functional_requirements.description: The system must allow logged-in customers to view a list of their past orders and their current status.

acceptance_criteria.description: The order history page must display the order date, total amount, and current status (e.g., Shipped, Delivered).

functional_requirements.title: Admin Product Management
functional_requirements.description: Admin users must be able to create, read, update, and delete product listings.

acceptance_criteria.description: Admin must be able to update product price and stock level.
Admin must be able to assign product categories.

functional_requirements.title: Admin Order Fulfillment
functional_requirements.description: Admin users must be able to view all placed orders and update their fulfillment status.

acceptance_criteria.description: Admin must be able to change the order status (e.g., Pending -> Shipped).
The system must log the user who changed the order status and the timestamp.

functional_requirements.title: User Account Management
functional_requirements.description: The system must allow customers to register, log in, and manage their personal profile and shipping addresses.

acceptance_criteria.description: The user must be able to register an account using a unique email and password.
The user must be able to view, edit, and save multiple shipping addresses.

functional_requirements.title: Advanced Search and Filtering
functional_requirements.description: The system must enhance product browsing by allowing users to filter results by attributes (e.g., brand, price range) and sort by criteria (e.g., rating, price).

acceptance_criteria.description: The system must allow filtering of products by brand name.
The system must allow sorting of the product list by price (ascending/descending).

non_functional_requirements.description: The platform must load critical pages (Catalog, Product Detail) within 3 seconds under normal load.

acceptance_criteria.description: The catalog page must load fully within 3 seconds when displaying up to 100 products.

non_functional_requirements.description: All user authentication and sensitive data (passwords, addresses) must be handled securely.

acceptance_criteria.description: Passwords must be hashed using industry-standard algorithms (e.g., bcrypt).
Admin endpoints must require role-based access control (RBAC).

non_functional_requirements.description: The platform must be fully responsive and usable across major devices (desktop, tablet, mobile).

acceptance_criteria.description: The layout must maintain functionality and readability when viewed on a standard mobile viewport (320px width).

use_cases.title: Place Order as Customer
preconditions: Cart contains at least one item.
main_flow: System validates stock and calculates final total.
System processes payment and creates order record.
alternative_flows: If stock is insufficient, the system notifies the user and prompts for quantity reduction.
If payment fails, the system displays an error and allows retry.

use_cases.title: Browse and View Product Details
preconditions: Customer is on the e-commerce site.
main_flow: Customer searches or browses the catalog.
Customer clicks on a product listing.
System displays the detailed product page.
Customer adds the item to the cart.

use_cases.title: Manage Inventory (Admin)
preconditions: Admin user is logged in with appropriate permissions.
main_flow: Admin navigates to the product management dashboard.
Admin selects a product to edit.
Admin updates stock count, price, or description.
